name: Crispy Wontons
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Medium-size shrimp, peeled, deveined and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground pork, shrimp, water chestnuts, green onions, soy sauce, salt, cornstarch, and grated ginger in a bowl until well combined.
2. Place about 1/2 teaspoon of the mixture in the center of each wonton skin.
3. Fold the skin over the filling to form a triangle shape.
4. Turn the top of the triangle down to meet the fold.
5. Turn over the wonton and moisten one corner with water.
6. With a twisting motion, overlap the opposite corner over the moistened corner; press firmly.
7. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large saucepan over medium-high heat until it reaches 375°F (190°C).
8. Add the wontons in batches and cook for 2 to 3 minutes, or until they are brown and crispy.
9. Drain on paper towels and serve warm with Kikkoman Sweet & Sour Sauce.
